name: @ggui-ai/agent-server
description: Brand-agnostic Hono-based HTTP backend for ggui-aware agents. Owns the wire shape, MCP discovery, tool-result resource inlining, server-allocated chat ids, and guest + bearer auth with chat ownership so per-SDK samples only have to implement a thin AgentAdapter (prompt + chatId in → NormalizedMessage stream out). The prompt is forwarded to the adapter verbatim — the prompt path has no ggui-protocol knowledge; the library itself implements the ggui runtime surface (render-resource inlining, tool-catalog declaration). Pairs with `@ggui-ai/react/chat-helpers` on the frontend.
author: ggui contributors <hello@ggui.ai>
